title: senecio lanibracteus
intro: Senecio lanibracteus, also known as the "Mountain Ragwort" or "Ragwort", is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Senecio lanibracteus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
